feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2101 201 1900 98
TR 1944 172 1772 82

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Clank!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺599,99 → ₺399,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺599,99]）

In-App Purchases

  • Sunken Treasures：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺499,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺399,99

In-App Purchases

  • Mummy's Curse：₺499,99
  • Sunken Treasures：₺399,99

Application Description

Burgle your way to adventure in the award-winning board game! A New Adventure Begins! Clank!, the iconic deck-building board game adventure, challenges daring thieves to sneak into a dragon’s lair, steal one of her precious artifacts, and escape – before you’re roasted to a crisp! Winning fans and awards around the world, Clank! is one of the most-beloved modern board games, with a wide range of expansions and adaptations for players to enjoy. How Deep will you Delve? The deeper you go, the more valuable treasures you’ll find…but the harder it will be to escape! So be quick and be quiet: One false step and – CLANK! Each careless sound risks drawing the dragon’s attention. You’re competing against your fellow thieves to claim the most valuable prize…but you can only enjoy your loot if you make it out of the depths alive! Choose Your Path You’ll need a good pair of boots, a sharp sword, and all your roguish skills to survive in the dungeon. Along the way, you’ll acquire new items, abilities, and allies that will help you achieve victory! Blending deck-building and exploration, Clank! offers a unique dungeon-delving adventure each time you play." Many Ways to Play Learn the ropes in a guided Tutorial, then hone your abilities by collecting Achievements and completing Challenges. Play cross-platform against friends, or compete in exciting new Heists that put you up against players from around the world! However you choose to enter the dungeon: Good luck!...you’re going to need it!

entry.title: Dune: Imperium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺599,99 → ₺399,99 [₺299,99 ~ ₺599,99]）

In-App Purchases

  • Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [₺349,99 ~ ₺499,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺399,99

In-App Purchases

  • Dune: Imperium - Uprising：₺599,99
  • Dune: Imperium - Rise of Ix：₺399,99
  • Dune: Imperium - Immortality：₺499,99

Application Description

Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium! Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal. Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader. Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning. Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same! Control the Spice. Control the Universe. Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it. Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Ark Nova
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺599,99 → ₺399,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺599,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺399,99

Application Description

Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game. In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans. Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are: BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions. ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo. CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards). ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks. SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money. With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

entry.title: Root Board Game
entry.summary:
Price: ₺499,99 → ₺149,99
The Riverfolk Expansion: ₺499,99 → ₺399,99
Root: The Underworld Expansion: ₺499,99 → ₺399,99
The Clockwork Expansion: ₺299,99 → ₺199,99
Root: The Marauder Expansion: ₺499,99 → ₺399,99
Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds: ₺399,99 → ₺299,99
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺149,99 [₺149,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

In-App Purchases

  • The Riverfolk Expansion：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [₺299,99 ~ ₺499,99]
  • Root: The Underworld Expansion：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [₺299,99 ~ ₺499,99]
  • The Clockwork Expansion：₺299,99 → ₺199,99 [₺179,99 ~ ₺299,99]
  • Root: The Marauder Expansion：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺499,99]
  • Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds：₺399,99 → ₺299,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺399,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

In-App Purchases

  • The Riverfolk Expansion：₺399,99
  • Root: The Underworld Expansion：₺399,99
  • The Clockwork Expansion：₺199,99
  • Root: The Marauder Expansion：₺399,99
  • Exiles & Partisans & Vagabonds：₺299,99
  • Hirelings & Landmarks：₺499,99

Application Description

Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness. The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods. Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright. The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Shotgun King
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺199,99 [₺199,99 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺199,99

Application Description

Chess, but all your army has gone over to the white side, leaving you with nothing but your royal shotgun and your wounded pride. Carried by your dark folly, you decide it's time to teach those white pieces to fear the Shotgun King. Every turn, you may either move your king or shoot at enemy pieces, after what you'll need to move again to reload your shotgun. Avoid checkmate and kill the enemy king to complete the floor. After each floor, you may choose between two random combinations of one upgrade for you and one upgrade for the other side. Choose wisely and keep on winning floors and you just may get your kingdom back. Runs may take ~20 minutes to complete. The game features 15 ranks of difficulty, unlockable cards, over 100 achievements to complete, an endless mode, and now a chase mode where you get continually assailed from all sides!

  • Prime Gemma 500：₺249,99
  • Spray kit：₺199,99
  • Ascensio Kit：₺249,99
  • Zenith Islands DLC Sale：₺149,99
  • Prime Dimension DLC Sale：₺149,99
  • Crystal Offer Sale：₺499,99

Application Description

Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer? Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures. Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles. Explore this monster adventure game Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer? Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer? Key Features: - Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide - 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve. - No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame! - A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay. - Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements. - Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo. - Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards. - Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game. - Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs. Why Players Love EvoCreo 2: Fans of Monster games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home. A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy. Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure. Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

entry.title: Strongbox Pro
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺3.999,99 → ₺2.999,99 [₺2.999,99 ~ ₺6.999,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺2.999,99

In-App Purchases

  • Annual Tip：₺239,99
  • Monthly Tip：₺35,99
  • Huge Tip：₺9.999,99
  • Large Tip：₺4.999,99
  • Medium Tip：₺999,99
  • Small Tip：₺499,99
  • Little Tip：₺249,99

Application Description

Strongbox Pro is available here for outright and upfront purchase instead of via an In-App Purchase upgrade. This version of Strongbox is identical to the much loved Strongbox application with all the Pro features and the same regular update schedule. Strongbox is an application for keeping all your passwords safely stored and protected by one master password. Supporting the open source Password Safe and KeePass formats. *** Supports Family Sharing *** *** Features *** - Face ID/Touch ID Unlock for the ultimate in convenience, security and speed. - PIN Code Unlock with a Duress PIN option for those tricky situations. - Passkey support - The latest, most convenient and most secure authentication method (passkeys). - YubiKey protection - secure your databases with a hardware token. - Secure - protected by time tested military grade cryptography. - Private - Isolated In-App attachments viewer for your sensitive documents, photos & videos. - Audit your passwords - Automatically check your database for weak passwords including a 'Have I Been Pwned?' check. - Cloud Support, so you can access your cloud safes using iCloud, Dropbox, OneDrive, Google Drive, WebDAV or SFTP even when offline. Use the built in Files app for many other storage options or store them securely only on your local device. You choose your storage. - Search your entire set of passwords and secrets instantly and powerfully, with deep search. Autocomplete new entries, and auto generate secure passwords. - Compatible - Import/Export by Files app, Email, CSV, iTunes File Sharing or use cloud storage. - Standards compliant - using the time tested Password Safe and KeePass formats so you can import any existing password safe you have. - Features galore - Incredibly configurable password generation including Diceware (XKCD) & regular passwords. - Timed Auto Clear Clipboard. - Entry History. - KeePass Field References, Tags, Custom Icon & FavIcons (including automatic search & download). - Two Factor Authentication codes (TOTP) - QR Code, Steam & Manual. --------------------------------------------------------------------- • Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase • Strongbox Privacy Policy may be found here: https://strongboxsafe.com/privacy-policy/ • Strongbox Terms of Use may be found here: https://strongboxsafe.com/terms/

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: GenChord - Guitar Scale Chord
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

GenChord Guitar is a chord and music theory tool built around the guitar fretboard. It does more than show where to place your fingers: it connects chords, scales, fingering shapes, diatonic harmony and tensions on the same fretboard so each voicing makes sense. Search chords by root, type and tension, including triads, sevenths, sixths, sus, aug, dim, half-dim, b5, #5, bb7 and 9/11/13 tensions. Use Chord Explain for Mi, Sol, La, Si and Re shapes related to CAGED. Generate I-VII diatonic chords, play voicings and save them to Collections with iCloud Drive or local storage.

entry.title: GenChord - Piano Scale Chord
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

This time, you can learn chords and scales visually. Explore the structure of chords by moving different chord tones. You’ll gain a thorough understanding of the origins of chord names. This app can generate every chord structure you can imagine, making it easy to look up and memorize them. The process of understanding music should be clear and simple. GenChord helps you uncover the core principles behind music. · Library – Quick Chord Lookup Generate every possible chord from a music theory perspective—no need to wonder if the list is complete. Tap to play the chord, long press to arpeggiate, swipe right for details. · Query - Chord Reverse Finder. Reverse lookup for basic chords / omit chords / inverted chords / chords with all added tensions. In the playground, Bluetooth connection and MIDI cable connection are also supported. Now you can enjoy features that were previously available only to PC users. · Create – Your Own Chords collect and curate chord progressions. Enjoy more control features, add memory curves, and include numbered notation. Rearrange and combine freely—one chord can evolve into endless variations. Your pop/jazz assistant—you deserve it. · Playground – Music Sandbox For teaching, training, and testing—your free space to play music and your Swiss Army knife for creation. Highly recommended: the Diatonic Chords feature to explore beautiful progressions. Tap anytime, anywhere to trigger inspiring notes.

entry.title: TRINITY TRIGGER
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺249,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺249,99

Application Description

　　　[Caution] Before purchasing or using this application, please be sure to read the [Notes on this application] at the bottom of the page. As Cyan, a young man burdened by the gods with the mantle of Warrior of Chaos and an inevitable clash against the Warrior of Order, players will set out on a grand adventure to defy fate and save Trinitia. Cyan and his companions Elise and Zantis are accompanied by strange creatures known as Triggers that can transform into eight types of weapons, and players can switch freely between the three characters to implement a solo combat strategy Together, they will write a new destiny. Master the Weapons of the Gods Solve puzzles and defeat enemies traverse the dungeons of each Arma, towers made from the fallen weapons of the gods. Seek Out Trinitia’s Mysteries Reveal hidden passages by exploring every last bit of Trinitia’s diverse biomes. Chat with townsfolk for clues to uncover the heavily guarded secrets held in these forests, deserts, snowfields, and more. Change the Tide of Battle Make expert use of the Weapon Wheel in battle to change between eight weapon types on the fly. Every enemy has a weakness—finding and exploiting it is the key to victory. A Generational Role-Playing Epic Trinity Trigger was inspired by the iconic RPGs of yesteryear, but its accessible and rewarding gameplay incorporates modern flourishes to make it an exciting new adventure for players of all ages. [Notes on this application] ▼△▼ Operating Environment ▼△▼ iOS 12.0 or later *Only officially released operating systems are supported. We do not guarantee that you will be able to play the game comfortably. ▼△▼ Recommended Devices ▼△▼ iPhone 11 or later, iPad 7th generation or later Internal memory (RAM): 2GB or more ▼△▼ Recommended Play ▼△▼ This application has an auto-save function, However, in order to avoid unexpected situations, it is recommended to “save often”. Starting the application while multiple applications are running may cause unstable operation. To ensure stable play, we recommend that you play the game with other apps down. ▼△▼ Disclaimer ▼△▼ 1. Please note that support will not be provided for operation on OS versions other than the supported OS versions. 2. due to customer usage conditions and model-specific factors, even with a compatible model, operation may be unstable or may not work properly. 3. Even if “iOSXXX or higher” is listed as the supported OS version, it does not necessarily mean that the latest version is supported. 4. It may take some time to start the game after the application is launched depending on the model. 5. A frame may appear on the screen depending on the model. Refunds (including exchanges for other products or services) will not be accepted for any reason. © FURYU Corporation.

entry.title: Tokyo Train!
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺149,99 → ₺29,99 [₺2,99 ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺29,99

Application Description

Run Japan's trains! No railroad knowledge is required to play "Tokyo Train!". This game is a brain game with simple rules but requires a lot of brain power. Customers are waiting at the station for the trains to arrive to take them to their destinations. Start the trains and transport your customers. You will earn money for every passenger who boards a train. Adjust the interval between runs and the number of cars to achieve the highest revenue. Departing trains costs money. If you send out too many trains and the boarding rate drops, you will lose your revenue. The operation method is very easy and the rules are simple. All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time. As the game progresses, express fares will also appear. No technical knowledge is required at all. Both people who like trains and people who like games can quickly understand and enjoy the game. There are no in-app purchases. There are no ads. Please concentrate on the game. Share your operating results on social media.

entry.title: Balatro
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺264,99 → ₺185,00 [₺185,00 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺185,00

Application Description

Welcome to the official Balatro mobile game! Hypnotic and endlessly satisfying, Balatro is a magical mix of card games like Solitaire and Poker, that lets you twist the rules in ways never seen before! Your goal is to beat the Boss Blinds by making strong poker hands. Find new Jokers that change the game and create awesome and exciting combos! Win enough chips to beat tricky bosses, and find hidden bonus hands and decks as you play. You’ll need all the help you can get to beat the big boss, win the final challenge, and win the game. Features: * Remastered controls for touch screen devices. * Each run is different: every pick-up, discard and joker can dramatically alter the course of your run. * Multiple game items: discover over 150 Jokers, each with special powers. Use them with different decks,upgrade cards and vouchers to boost your scores. * Different Game modes: Campaign mode and challenge mode for you to play. * Beautiful Pixel Art: Immerse yourself in the CRT fuzz and enjoy detailed, hand-crafted pixel art.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Deflection
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺399,99 → ₺49,99 [Free ~ ₺599,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

Deflection is a powerful, versatile calculator for beams, 2D trusses, and 2D frames. The interface is simple and intuitive, and the graphical output is state-of-the-art. In addition to reaction, shear, bending moment, and deflection results, Deflection also computes internal shear and bending stress along the cross section and along the beam. 2D FRAME AND TRUSS EDITOR The 2D editor is seamlessly integrated with the beam editor. Draw arbitrary frame and truss structures and apply loads and constraints using the same simple interface as for beams. You can visualize results directly within the 2D editor, or you can select a beam and get additional insights. INTERNAL STRESSES Obtain internal bending and shear stress diagrams in addition to shear, bending, and deflection diagrams. The internal stresses can be visualized along the length of the beam as well as along the vertical axis of the cross section using the beam editor. CROSS SECTION EDITOR Edit built-in cross sections. Moment of inertia and area values are automatically calculated and applied to the rest of the beam calculations. MORE FEATURES • The built-in database contains more data for your reference and convenience. • Apply beam self-weight optionally • Unlimited design files • Quick-start templates CONTACT We like to hear from you! Please email contact@ketchep.com if you have any issues, questions, or comments.

entry.title: Moment Pro Camera II
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺299,99 [₺299,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺299,99

Application Description

Your Camera, Your Looks, Your Way. Moment Pro Camera II turns your phone into your favorite camera for photography and filmmaking. Shoot like a pro with full manual controls, creative looks, and an upgraded interface – all in one intuitive app. What’s New in Pro Camera II? Our first pro camera app has been the #1 rated camera app for years. Now, it’s time for the next chapter. We’ve re-engineered Pro Camera II from the ground up to give you better performance, advanced controls, and new customizable interfaces and shooting modes. Key Features: • Pro-Level Exposure Control – Our smart exposure system allows you to take control with Shutter Priority, ISO Priority, Manual, and Auto exposure modes, including the ability to limit Auto ISO to a specific range. • Upgraded White Balance – Beyond auto white balance, you can manually configure temperature and tint, choose a preset, or calibrate via a gray card. • Advanced Photo Options – Control the level of processing and HDR applied to your photos. Shoot in RAW, ProRAW, TIFF, HEIF, or JPG. • Cinematic Video Tools – Apple Log, Open Gate, ProRes, 10-bit recording, and more. Adjust the resolution, color space, frame rate, codec, bitrate, and chroma subsampling for total creative freedom. • Precision Monitoring – Get pro-level feedback with Waveform, RGB Histograms, and audio meters — normally reserved for cinema cameras. • Aspect Ratio – Frame your shot within your favorite aspect ratio (4:3, 16:9, 3:2, 5:4, 1:1) • Designed for All Creators – A beautiful, intuitive interface that adapts to how you shoot. Swipe, tap, and adjust anything immediately with one hand (including a dedicated left-handed layout), or go distraction-free with Zen Mode. Works natively in landscape orientation. • Looks, Your Way – Apply creative Looks or import your own LUTs to video and photos. Preview them live, bake them into your footage, or adjust intensity on the fly. • Focus Tools That Just Work – Separate reticles for exposure and focus with a tap, or dial in the shot with Manual Focus and Focus Peaking. • Quick Actions, Faster Shooting – One swipe to reach your most used tools: flash, stabilization, zebras, focus peaking, grids, and more. • Intuitive Lens Control – Remove the guesswork of which lens you are using and eliminate surprises with our Optic Controls. Say goodbye to shaky zoom with our fluid zoom control. • Hardware-Ready – Optimized for every iPhone, with seamless integration for external mics and Moment’s entire lens + case ecosystem. Upcoming Feature Releases • Look Store: purchase creator color grades and film emulations • Slow Shutter and Timelapse modes • Advanced Profile sharing and collaboration tools • Extended hardware integration partnerships We love hearing from our community. For feature requests, ideas, or support, email us at hello@shopmoment.com or message us @momentprocamera on social media. Fully Compatible with iPhone and Moment's complete ecosystem of lenses, cases, and accessories.
